action.reasoning: The task requires a comprehensive business plan with five distinct, complex sections. Generating all of this in a single execution would likely result in shallow analysis and poor structure. Decomposing the task into parallel subtasks for each major section (Market Analysis, Competitor Analysis, Revenue Model, Go-to-Market, Financial Projections) allows for deeper, more focused research and writing. I will then integrate these components into a final, cohesive business plan document.

subtasks.goal: Conduct market analysis for a Korean local-review platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask analyzes the size, growth, and trends of the Korean local review market. It provides the foundational context for the business plan by identifying target demographics and market opportunities.

outputs.description: Detailed market analysis including TAM/SAM/SOM, growth trends, and user demographics in Korea.

subtasks.goal: Perform competitor analysis for the Korean local-review landscape.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask identifies key competitors like Naver Maps, Google Maps, and specialized review sites. It evaluates their strengths, weaknesses, and market share to identify gaps for the new platform.

outputs.description: Detailed competitor analysis including SWOT analysis and differentiation strategies.

subtasks.goal: Develop a revenue model for the platform.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask defines how the platform will make money, exploring options like advertising, premium listings, and data services. It ensures the business has a viable path to profitability.

outputs.description: Detailed revenue model including pricing strategies, monetization channels, and unit economics.

subtasks.goal: Create a go-to-market strategy.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask outlines the launch plan, marketing channels, and user acquisition strategies specific to the Korean market. It details how the platform will gain initial traction and scale.

outputs.description: Detailed go-to-market strategy including launch phases, marketing channels, and user acquisition tactics.

subtasks.goal: Generate financial projections for the first 5 years.
subtasks.capsule: This subtask creates realistic financial forecasts including P&L, cash flow, and balance sheet projections. It provides the quantitative basis for investment decisions and operational planning.

outputs.description: 5-year financial projections including P&L, cash flow, and key assumptions.

self_role.goal: Integrate all subtask outputs into a complete, cohesive business plan document.

outputs.description: The final, integrated business plan document combining market analysis, competitor analysis, revenue model, go-to-market strategy, and financial projections.

self_role.condition: done("root.1/market_analysis") AND done("root.2/competitor_analysis") AND done("root.3/revenue_model") AND done("root.4/go_to_market") AND done("root.5/financial_projections")
